title: roemeria carica
intro: Roemeria carica, also known as the roeheria or roemeria, is a flowering plant in the poppy family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of roemeria carica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Roemeria carica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
